metadata.title: Faro — AI Visibility for Your Business
metadata.description: Faro tracks how AI agents recommend your business across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini — and makes sure you're the one they pick.

hero.headline: We make sure ChatGPT recommends your business.
hero.subhead: Faro tracks how AI agents recommend small and mid-sized businesses across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini — then makes sure your business is the one they pick. Built for South Florida. In English and Español.

problem.heading: Your customers are asking AI who to hire. You want to be the answer.
problem.para1: About one in ten searches in the US now happen on AI platforms instead of Google. That number is growing every month. Your customers are already asking ChatGPT, “Who’s a good accountant near me?” or “What’s the best HVAC company in Miami?” before they ever open a browser tab.
problem.para2: AI doesn’t return ten blue links. It reads its sources, forms an opinion, and names one or two businesses. If you’re not in that answer, you don’t exist — no matter how good your Google reviews are.
problem.para3: Most local and mid-sized businesses have no idea whether they’re showing up in AI recommendations. There are no reports, no dashboards, no alerts. Faro changes that.

step1.heading: We track
step1.body: We monitor every major AI agent — ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini — for the questions your customers actually ask. We see when you appear, when competitors appear, and which sources AI is citing.

step2.heading: We optimize
step2.body: We write and publish content that AI agents trust. We get your business into the directories, listicles, and review sites that AI cites most. Done for you — in English and Spanish.

step3.heading: We report
step3.body: Every month, you and your CPA get a two-page report showing exactly where you stand. No dashboards to learn. No marketing jargon. Just whether AI is recommending you more than last month.

forAdvisors.heading: Are you a CPA or trusted advisor?
forAdvisors.para1: Faro is built to be offered through advisor relationships. Your clients trust you with their finances, their taxes, and increasingly their business strategy. AI visibility is the next frontier — and it’s one they’ll need help navigating.
forAdvisors.para2: Partner firms get co-branded monthly reports, a revenue share on every client they refer, and the option to lock in exclusive territory coverage for their market. We handle everything — you stay the trusted advisor.

waitlist.heading: Join the waitlist.
waitlist.subhead: We’re onboarding our first ten Miami pilot clients. Be one of them.
waitlist.confirmationBody: You’re on the list. We’ll reach out within a week.
waitlist.networkError: Network error — please check your connection and try again.
